{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220356293247C04C51E364F67CD7"}"},"total":5204},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7447895231390958361","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的书，写的很不错，比起那些和尚修仙文好太多了，人为什么修仙？除了长生和权力最大原因是不舍红尘，一辈子重复的找机缘闭关修炼找机缘修炼，修到顶点有毛用"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734103032,"group_id":"7413617965112773657","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8yNkNxzOeVLUjpiTruvBdg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/de2f6564aa1a441f9349244b38bc7f16~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706557&x-signature=cd0d7POPvSeXYc3ExzzuYy3Lhno%3D","user_id":"5822463684","user_name":"神气嘟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"5822463684","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7413617965112773657","book_info":{"abstract":"（天才修仙，杀伐果断，轻松向，系统，扮猪吃虎，虐菜圣手，炸鱼天尊，多女）
穿越仙侠世界，齐元虽然没有觉醒出金手指，却也一路顺风顺水，一年筑基，三年结丹，凭借绝世天资轰动太玄圣地，年纪轻轻就当上了圣地道子，地位尊崇，风头无两。
直到某天出现了一个奇葩系统：
【请宿主在三天内打败黑虎帮堂主徐彪（修为：炼气三层）（任务难度：四颗星）】
看着废材逆袭系统发布的第一个任务，刚刚当上圣地道子，金丹圆满的齐元有些发懵：
“系统，你是不是找错人了，我堂堂金丹道子，你让我去欺负一个炼气？”
“经验证，宿主身份准确无误”
“可是，这个任务也太简单了吧，我派个小弟的小弟都能把目标打出翔来.......”
“经验证，任务内容准确无误”
“好吧，我去试试。”
从此，修仙界多了一个不讲仙德的妖孽道子。
......
圣地掌门：“本座在此郑重声明，那个混世魔王和我家道子只是名字相同而已，绝不是同一个人，若再有人散播谣言，我们太玄圣地定会追究到底。”
受害苦主：“不是，为何要抢我的道侣，你自己没有么？”
魔宗老祖：“你都飞升了，还专门下来对付我一个大乘境的老人家，这好吗？这不好！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a4d27648ea782c17cb2611785ec27db4","author":"东大街一霸","author_id":"","book_id":"7413617965112773657","book_name":"这个道子正的发邪","book_short_name":"玩儿坏修仙界","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"18.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7413617968271082009","read_count":"183023","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2272983"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1019","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,天才,扮猪吃虎,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6df84357bab43ffddd6ca18ede88e3d6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306989&x-signature=nRqAKVsPmfU%2BXy6ysP9YVtXphn4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"85982424567","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"89"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220356293247C04C51E364F67CD7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":56,"f
